message:
feat(store): hash field TTL storage primitives (br-frankenredis-wwz3, rv89 part 1)

First slice of the Redis 7.4 HEXPIRE family. Adds per-field TTL state
to Store with flag-aware setters, unit-aware readers, and lifecycle
cleanup hooks for HDEL / whole-key eviction. No hash-read path yet
consults the TTL map — that's part 3 (br-frankenredis-b8ut). No command
layer yet — part 2 (br-frankenredis-c0z9).

Surface added (Store impl):
  - field: hash_field_expires: BTreeMap<(Vec<u8>, Vec<u8>), u64>
  - hash_field_set_abs_expiry(key, field, at_ms, cond, now_ms) -> HashFieldTtlSet
    with NX/XX/GT/LT condition codes; past-deadline returns AppliedAlreadyExpired.
  - hash_field_ttl(key, field, now_ms, unit, absolute) -> HashFieldTtl
    returning Remaining / NoTtl / FieldMissing / KeyMissing / WrongType / Expired
    with HTTL/HPTTL-style rounding + HEXPIRETIME/HPEXPIRETIME absolute mode.
  - hash_field_persist(key, field) -> HashFieldPersistResult
  - hash_field_is_expired(key, field, now_ms) -> bool
  - hash_field_ttl_carrier_count() -> usize (for OBJECT ENCODING in part 4)
  - hash_field_ttl_clear_for_key(key) — wiring point for DEL/FLUSH/expiry
  - hash_field_ttl_clear_for_field(key, field) — wiring point for HDEL

Public enums: HashFieldTtlCondition, HashFieldTtlSet, HashFieldTtl,
HashFieldTtlUnit, HashFieldPersistResult — doc-commented with the
upstream reply-code mapping (-2 missing, -1 no-TTL, 0 condition-blocked,
1 applied, 2 applied-already-expired).

Tests: crates/fr-store/tests/hash_field_ttl.rs — 16 cases covering
set-read-persist roundtrip, absolute vs remaining, seconds rounding,
NX / XX / GT / LT flag matrix (including GT-with-no-prior and LT-with-no-prior
edge cases), past-deadline surfacing, WRONGTYPE / KeyMissing / FieldMissing
paths, persist idempotency, carrier-count tracking, and the per-key /
per-field clear helpers. All 16 pass; fr-store workspace tally 280/0.

Co-Authored-By: cc-redis <noreply@anthropic.com>
